name: Cushioncone 2
summary: Creates a brief, localized cushion of force that gently slows the impact of an object, preventing it from causing damage upon contact.
effect_description: Creates a brief, localized cushion of force that gently slows the impact of an object, preventing it from causing damage upon contact.
